question: How do I play LegionGames.io Games?
answer: You can play LegionGames.io Games by going to the set link. For example, view our latest game at https://plundur.io

question: Are LegionGames.io Products free?
answer: We are proud to make all of our products and content free for all.

question: How do I partner with LegionGames.io?
answer: Email us at legionplatforms@gmail.com to inquire about a partnership opportunity.

question: Do I have to download LegionGames.io Products?
answer: Nope. As a web-based company, all of our products are available on web browsers for everyone.

question: How do I apply to job/internships at LegionGames.io?
answer: View our careers page or email us legionplatforms@gmail.com for a direct job inquiry. We would love to hear from you!

question: What country is LegionGames.io based in?
answer: We are proudly based in the United States, but we deliver products to a worldwide audience.

question: How do I get updated on LegionGames.io news?
answer: View our LegionGames.io News page to receive updates on all LegionGames.io related press releases.
